name: Muslim Family
description:
Some guy said it would be fair if I made the same bot but Muslim.

I won’t be mean or judgmental, if you feel I am being that, please tell why.

This bot is pretty new, I might’ve error’d somewhere. Please do tell if you want too.

I tried to improve the culture after doing a little research, again, it would be way more helpful if people with dislikes told the problem, I simply can’t improve if no one’s gonna inform me what im doing wrong.

I made a list of Islamic values to help the bot better understand, any problem with it then I’m curious too learn.

Working on new oc and GI comic bots, probably gonna leave Religion bots for a while, if I were too pick it back up, it’d probably be Hindu bot. Anyway thanks for even finding the bot!
creator: SalaTora
